THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIDALGO EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ ROMULO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,018.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO ROMULO ORTIZ RETURNED MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS.
